title: 12 Electronic Bill Payment Reversals and Trace Requests
body_text:
12	Electronic Bill Payment Reversals and Trace Requests
12.1	Overview of Electronic Bill Payment Reversals and Trace Requests
A bill payment reversal can be requested to cancel a bill payment transaction (including a CRA payment) if, for example, the customer paid the incorrect amount, paid the incorrect biller account number, etc. The reversal request must be made on the same day as the original transaction and must be received before Central 1âs deadlines. Central 1 can only reverse a bill payment if it holds the financial institutionâs electronic bill payments database or if the bill payment is uploaded to Central 1 before the reversal deadline. Financial institutions use ServiceNow to submit bill payment reversal requests.
If a customer initiates a bill payment inquiry, the financial institution can assist the customer by reviewing its bill payment reports for the required information. If a trace request is required, enter the trace on the Online Tracing System (OLT). A trace can include a request for information (e.g., confirmation of the date the payment was applied), the provision of new information (e.g., the correct biller account number), or an adjustment request (e.g., the customer paid twice). If a trace request canât be created on OLT, use ServiceNow to submit the trace. See the Online Tracing System Part for procedures on creating trace requests.
OLT is also used to advise financial institutions of biller-initiated adjustments and trace requests. Biller-initiated requests for information arenât processed on OLT.
12.2	Electronic Bill Payment Reversal Requests
A reversal request can be sent to Central 1 to cancel a bill payment transaction that hasnât been sent to the biller. For example, a reversal can be requested if the customer paid the incorrect amount, paid the incorrect biller account number, etc. However, the reversal request must be made on the day of the original transaction, before the following deadlines:
4:00 pm PT, Monday to Friday for most billers
2:00 pm PT, Monday to Friday for Community Visa (650)
Create a trace request on OLT and request an adjustment if the reversal request isnât sent before the deadline. or if the payment was made to Vancity Visa (28), Vancity Com. Inv. Bank Visa (274), or International Transfers (13364). These billers donât accept reversal requests. Additionally, all corporate and personal CRA billers donât accept same-day bill payment reversal requests. The complete list of CRA billers that donât accept same-day bill payment reversal requests can be found
here
.
Important
:	Central 1 can only reverse a bill payment if it holds the financial institutionâs electronic bill payments database or if the bill payment is uploaded to Central 1 before the reversal deadline. Central 1 canât currently reverse bill payments for financial institutions in Ontario if the financial institution uploads bill payment batch files to Central 1.
Use ServiceNow to submit electronic bill payment reversal requests to Central 1. If ServiceNow is unavailable, use the Bill Payment Reversal Request, Form 1793.
Central 1 will advise the financial institution if the reversal request is successful. If the bill payment is successfully reversed, ensure that the customerâs account is credited. The transaction is only cancelled on Central 1âs system.
Note:	Bill payment reversals are subject to service charges. Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario can refer to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725.
Bill Payment Reversal Requests on ServiceNow
To request a bill payment reversal on ServiceNow:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	Youâll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itâs your first login to the Client Centre, youâve deleted your cookies, or youâre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
ServiceNow
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youâve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under âMy Favouritesâ.
Figure 3: Accessing ServiceNow
Select
Service Catalogue
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: Select Service Catalogue
Select
Bill Payment Reversal Request
in the Electronic Payments Category. See Figure 5.
Figure 5: Electronic Payments â Bill Payment Reversal Request
Completion of the Bill Payment Reversal Request is self-explanatory. See Figure 6.
Note:	Mandatory fields are highlighted red.
Figure 6: Bill Payment Reversal Request
The request is sent to Central 1 and a ServiceNow ticket number is created.
Bill Payment Reversal Requests via Bill Payment Reversal Request, Form 1793
Central 1 will only accept bill payment reversal requests via Bill Payment Reversal Request, Form 1793, if ServiceNow is unavailable. Proceed as follows:
Complete the Bill Payment Reversal Request, Form 1793. Completion of the form is self-explanatory. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Bill Payment Reversal Request, Form 1793
Send the form to Central 1 as directed on the form.
Related Information
List of Corporate and Personal CRA Billers
Bill Payment Reversal Request,
Form 1793
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule,
Form 2725
(available to Class A credit unions in BC and Ontario only)
12.3	Customer-Initiated Bill Payment Queries and Traces
In some situations, the financial institution can answer customersâ bill payment inquires by reviewing its bill payment reports. See Chapter 9, Electronic Bill Payment Reports, for detailed information on each report and procedures on obtaining the reports.
For example, see the BPCV or BPRE report to determine when a bill payment was sent, which biller was credited, and which biller account number was paid.
See the Online Tracing System Part for procedures on creating a trace request or making an adjustment (e.g., the payment was made to the wrong biller).
12.4	Biller-Initiated Bill Payment Queries and Traces
Central 1 will enter a trace request on OLT if it receives a biller-initiated notification (e.g., the biller provides the correct biller account number) or an adjustment regarding a customerâs payment. See the Online Tracing System Part for more information.
END
